Idioma.MSG_CambioMoneda: If you change the Payment Currency, the system will update the exchange rates
Idioma.MSG_CtaDestinoTrans: Define the destination account for the transfer
Idioma.MSG_CtasPropiasMismoBco: Accounts of the same bank and Interbank in
Idioma.MSG_CualquierCuentaCualquierBanco: Any account of any Bank in
Idioma.MSG_DigitarInformaciónEmisionManual: Define the information of manual issuance of payment order
Idioma.MSG_EmpresaConOtraMon: If you change the Payment Enterprise, the system will update the exchange rates
Idioma.MSG_ModificoInformacion: The information was modified, please press modify button
Idioma.MSG_NoCtasParaMedioPag: No accounts or currencies to payment
Idioma.MSG_NoEnviarEmitirCheque: Can not send to issue using Manual Check as payment method. Use Manual Payment Issue
Idioma.MSG_OPEmitidaDesaAnular: The Payment Order was previously issued. Do you want to CANCEL the Payment Order?
Idioma.MSG_OPVaciaOSinModificar: Can not send to Issue an empty or unmodified Order
Idioma.MSG_SoloCtasInterbancariasCualquierBanco: Only Interbank accounts of any bank in
Idioma.MSG_SoloCtasInterbancariasOtrosBancos: Only interbank accounts of other banks in
Idioma.MSG_SoloCtasMismoBanco: Only accounts of the same bank, of payment in
